creator: mike@sentex.net
text:
I had one box with INVARIANTS, but *not* the patch panic with a restart after 9days.  Not sure why it didnt save core

0{r-14mfitest}# panic: crunusebatch: ref -12884901886 not >= 0 on cred 0xfffff80103ece600
